title: Containers (docker / podman)
html:
Containers (docker / podman)

Contents

  • Images
  • Containers
  • Networks / volumes
  • Compose
  • Cleanup

Images

CommandDescription
 
docker images
local images
docker pull nginx:alpine
docker build -t myimg .
build from Dockerfile in cwd
docker tag myimg user/myimg:v1
docker push user/myimg:v1
docker rmi myimg
docker image prune -a
remove all unused images

Containers

CommandDescription
 
docker ps
running
docker ps -a
all (including stopped)
docker run --rm -it ubuntu bash
ephemeral interactive shell
docker run -d --name web -p 8080:80 nginx
detached, port-mapped, named
docker run -v $PWD:/app -w /app img cmd
mount cwd + workdir
docker run --env-file .env img
env from file
docker exec -it web bash
shell into running container
docker logs -f web
tail logs
docker stop web && docker rm web
stop and remove
docker stats
live resource usage

Networks / volumes

CommandDescription
 
docker network ls
docker network create mynet
docker run --network mynet ...
docker volume ls
docker volume create data
docker run -v data:/var/lib/app img
named volume

Compose

CommandDescription
 
docker compose up -d
start in background
docker compose ps
docker compose logs -f web
docker compose down
stop + remove containers/networks
docker compose down -v
+ remove named volumes (DATA LOSS)

Cleanup

CommandDescription
 
docker system df
space used by docker
docker system prune
remove stopped containers + dangling images
docker system prune -a --volumes
full cleanup (CAREFUL)
excerpt: Containers (docker / podman) Contents Images Containers Networks / volumes Compose Cleanup Images Command Description docker images local images docker pull nginx:alpine docker build -t myimg . build from Dockerfile in cwd docker tag myimg user/myimg:v1 docker push user/myimg:v1 docker rmi myimg docker image prune -a remove all unused images Containers Command Description docker ps running docker ps -a all (including stopped) docker run --rm -it ubuntu bash ephemeral interactive shell docker run -d --name web -p 8080:80 nginx detached, port-mapped, named docker run -v $PWD:/app -w /app img cmd mount cwd + workdir docker run --env-file .env img env from file docker exec -it web bash shell into running container docker logs -f web tail logs docker stop web && docker rm web stop and remove docker stats live resource usage Networks / volumes Command Description docker network ls docker network create mynet docker run --network mynet ... docker volume ls docker volume create data docker run -v data:/var/lib/app img named volume Compose Command Description docker compose up -d start in background docker compose ps docker compose logs -f web docker compose down stop + remove containers/networks docker compose down -v + remove named volumes (DATA LOSS) Cleanup Command Description docker system df space used by docker docker system prune remove stopped containers + dangling images docker system prune -a --volumes full cleanup (CAREFUL)
